title: Login page error
description: Users cannot log in using Google authentication.

title: Payment gateway failure
description: Transactions are failing for credit card payments.

title: Slow dashboard loading
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Email notification not sent
description: Users do not receive account verification emails.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Uploading profile images fails for large files.

title: Search function not working
description: Search results are empty for valid queries.

title: Broken product images
description: Product images are not loading on the catalog page.

title: App crash on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Incorrect order total
description: Order summary shows incorrect total amount.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset link expires immediately after generation.

title: Notification badge not updating
description: Unread notification count does not refresh.
